ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: By the sun and its brightness
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: By the sun and its brightness,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the moon when it follows it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the moon as it follows it,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the day when it displays it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the day as it unveils it,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the night when it covers it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the night as it conceals it!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And by heaven and ˹the One˺ Who built it,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the earth and ˹the One˺ Who spread it!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And by the soul and ˹the One˺ Who fashioned it,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: then with ˹the knowledge of˺ right and wrong inspired it!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He has succeeded who purifies it,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Successful indeed is the one who purifies their soul,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and doomed is the one who corrupts it!

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Thamûd rejected ˹the truth˺ out of arrogance,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: when the most wicked of them was roused ˹to kill the she-camel˺.

ayahs.textArabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمۡ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقۡيَٰهَا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faqala lahum rasoolu Allahi naqata Allahi wasuqyaha
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But the messenger of Allah warned them, “˹Do not disturb˺ Allah’s camel and her ˹turn to˺ drink!”

ayahs.textArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمۡدَمَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fakaththaboohu faAAaqarooha fadamdama AAalayhim rabbuhum bithanbihim fasawwaha
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Still they defied him and slaughtered her. So their Lord crushed them for their crime, levelling all to the ground.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He has no fear of consequences.
